title: arnshop E-Commerce Platform
challenge: Build a complete e-commerce platform for electronic devices with inventory management, shopping cart, and a professional Java GUI.
solution: Developed a full Java Swing application with MySQL backend, product catalog, order flow, and admin inventory controls.
testimonial: A polished e-commerce build that demonstrates strong Java architecture and UI design.

title: Handwriting Recognition AI
challenge: Train a convolutional neural network to classify handwritten digits and text from large datasets with high accuracy.
solution: Implemented a CNN pipeline in Python with TensorFlow, dataset preprocessing, model training, and evaluation workflows.
testimonial: Solid ML fundamentals with a working handwriting recognition pipeline.

title: mqtt-weather-app IoT System
challenge: Collect and visualize real-time weather sensor data using MQTT pub/sub with a reliable Python backend.
solution: Built a Flask API with MQTT subscriptions, Dockerized services, and a live weather dashboard for sensor streams.
testimonial: Clean IoT architecture with MQTT integration and practical sensor monitoring.
